evals.prompt: ACME-595 PR 리뷰해줘. docs/pr-for-review/[ACME-595] 일정카드 모드별 컴포넌트 분리.md 파일이고, 브랜치는 ACME-595/split-place-card, 작성자는 seyoonagain이야.
evals.expected_output: A structured review document saved to docs/reviews/ACME-595-review.md with git-truth validation, scope-aware deep code review as primary section, AI review triage as secondary section, and developer feedback in Korean. Developer profile created at docs/reviews/developers/seyoonagain.md.
expectations: Review document saved to docs/reviews/ACME-595-review.md
Developer profile created at docs/reviews/developers/seyoonagain.md
Review contains 스코프 확인 section if OUT_OF_SCOPE files detected, or omits it cleanly if all files are in-scope
Review contains PR 기술 검증 section with a verification table comparing PR claims to actual git diff
코드 리뷰 결과 section appears ABOVE AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section (code review is primary)
코드 리뷰 결과 contains at least 3 substantive findings from independent code analysis
Findings use dual classification: Fix-Self/Pass-to-Creator AND severity (🔴 HIGH / 🟡 MEDIUM / 🟢 LOW)
코드 리뷰 결과 section includes severity summary line (총 X건: 🔴 HIGH A건 / 🟡 MEDIUM B건 / 🟢 LOW C건)
Review triages at least 20 of 25 CodeRabbit comments (12 actionable + 13 nitpick) in the secondary section
Review contains all three triage categories: Fix-Self, Pass-to-Creator, and Dismissed
Fix-Self items include severity emoji and concrete one-line fix descriptions (not vague)
Pass-to-Creator items include severity level, educational Korean explanations with 심각도/문제/이유/제안 structure
Feedback section contains 잘한 점 (Strengths) before 학습 포인트 (Learning Points)
Developer profile has categorized entries (at least 3 distinct categories like React Patterns, Type Safety, etc.)
Review shows evidence of reading actual source code (file:line references, code snippets, not just PR doc parroting)
Korean language used for all feedback with English technical terms preserved
Difficulty scale (리뷰 난이도) is calibrated: 1-5 with clear justification

evals.prompt: Review the PR at docs/pr-for-review/[ACME-452] 내가 작성한 리뷰 목록 조회 api 연결.md. Branch is ACME-452/my-reviews-api. Creator: 626-ju.
evals.expected_output: A full review with substantive code findings despite 0 AI review comments. The review's substance comes from independent deep code analysis (Step 4), not provider triage. Git-truth validation table present. Developer profile created.
files: docs/pr-for-review/[ACME-452] 내가 작성한 리뷰 목록 조회 api 연결.md
expectations: Review document saved to docs/reviews/ACME-452-review.md
Developer profile created/updated at docs/reviews/developers/626-ju.md
Review contains PR 기술 검증 section with git-truth validation table
코드 리뷰 결과 section contains substantive findings (at least 2) from independent code analysis with severity classification — NOT hollow
AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section gracefully handles 0 selected-provider comments without blocking the review
Review does NOT treat 0 AI review comments as a blocker — substance comes from code review
Review shows evidence of reading actual source code (file:line references, specific code critique)
코드 리뷰 결과 section appears ABOVE AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section
Korean language used for all feedback with English technical terms preserved

evals.expected_output: Display the developer profile for seyoonagain showing review history, statistics, category breakdown, strengths, and areas to watch.
expectations: Reads and references docs/reviews/developers/seyoonagain.md
Shows review count and last review date
Shows strengths and watch areas for the developer
Shows category-by-category history breakdown (at least 3 categories displayed)

evals.prompt: ACME-595 PR 퀵 리뷰해줘 --quick. docs/pr-for-review/[ACME-595] 일정카드 모드별 컴포넌트 분리.md 파일이고, 브랜치는 ACME-595/split-place-card, 작성자는 seyoonagain이야.
evals.expected_output: A quick review with git-truth validation and deep code review but NO AI review triage section and NO developer history update. Faster and more focused output.
expectations: Review document saved to docs/reviews/ACME-595-review.md
Review contains PR 기술 검증 section with verification table
코드 리뷰 결과 section contains substantive findings from independent code analysis
Review does NOT contain an AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section (skipped in quick mode)
Review does NOT create or update developer profile (skipped in quick mode)
Review is shorter than a full review — focused on code findings only
Korean language used for all feedback with English technical terms preserved

evals.prompt: GitHub Copilot 리뷰까지 같이 검증해줘. https://github.com/demodev-lab/moving-frontend/pull/161/ 이고 --review-source copilot 로 처리해. 작성자는 junyoung2015야.
evals.expected_output: A review flow that fetches the PR from GitHub, uses Copilot review metadata or sidecar JSON, and renders a GitHub Copilot-specific triage subsection under the AI review section.
expectations: Fetch step prefers GitHub PR data over local markdown-only parsing
Review uses --review-source copilot semantics
AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section contains a GitHub Copilot subsection
Copilot comments are grouped by the latest review round using pull_request_review_id
Dismissal logic can mark older Copilot rounds as stale instead of triaging them twice
Review still performs independent deep code review as the primary section

evals.prompt: 이 PR은 CodeRabbit이랑 Copilot 둘 다 보고 있어. https://github.com/demodev-lab/moving-frontend/pull/161/ 를 --review-source all 로 리뷰해줘. 자동 reply/resolve 는 하지 마.
evals.expected_output: A safe mixed-provider review that fetches all provider data, triages both Copilot and CodeRabbit if present, and renders provider-specific subsections without attempting commit/push/reply side effects.
expectations: Fetch step uses PR data from GitHub with --review-source all
Fetched data creates a sibling *.review-data.json sidecar
AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section can render provider-specific subsections for both GitHub Copilot and CodeRabbit
Review does not attempt commit/push/reply side effects during this eval
Any decisions JSON described is provider-neutral and works for either Copilot or CodeRabbit comment ids

evals.prompt: PR #161 퀵 리뷰해줘 --quick. 링크는 https://github.com/demodev-lab/moving-frontend/pull/161/ 이고 작성자는 junyoung2015야.
evals.expected_output: A quick review of PR #161 that still fetches the PR for context but omits the AI review triage section entirely and focuses on direct code findings.
expectations: Review fetches PR #161 context from GitHub
Review contains PR 기술 검증 section with direct code validation
Review does NOT contain an AI 리뷰 코멘트 검증 section
Review does NOT attempt developer-history update if quick mode semantics skip it
Review remains focused on direct code findings rather than provider comment triage

evals.prompt: /pr-review --auto 161 --review-source all --repo-path /Users/eddie/Desktop/demodev/moving-frontend --review-doc /Users/eddie/Desktop/demodev/moving-frontend/docs/reviews/MOVE-658-review.md 를 dirty repo에서 실행했어. --worktree 는 안 줬어.
evals.expected_output: Auto mode should stop safely before fix-forward or GitHub mutation, explain that the target repo is dirty, and recommend rerunning with --worktree auto or an explicit worktree path.
expectations: Auto mode validates the explicit repo path against the PR head repo
The workflow does not stash automatically
The workflow stops before commit, push, reply, or resolve actions
The response recommends --worktree auto or --worktree <abs-path>

evals.expected_output: Auto mode should prepare or reuse the deterministic clean worktree, create the first review doc at the resolved path if needed, append or resume a managed Round N section in the review doc, and generate artifacts under .pr-review/pr-161/round-N/ before stopping for supervised review.
expectations: prepare-pr-worktree.sh is used for deterministic worktree preparation
If the review doc does not exist yet, the workflow bootstraps it at the returned review_doc_path during Phase B
The review doc gains a managed Round N section with round_meta and round_decisions JSON blocks
Artifacts are written under .pr-review/pr-161/round-N/
The workflow stops after dry-run artifacts unless --live is present

evals.prompt: PR #161 auto review를 Round 2 기준으로 다시 돌려줘. Copilot은 이전 라운드도 있고 CodeRabbit은 최신 라운드에만 있어. --review-source all, --repo-path /Users/eddie/Desktop/demodev/moving-frontend, --review-doc /Users/eddie/Desktop/demodev/moving-frontend/docs/reviews/MOVE-658-review.md, --worktree auto.
evals.expected_output: Only the latest selected provider round(s) should populate round_decisions and the generated decisions artifact. Older Copilot rounds must be treated as stale and excluded.
expectations: Copilot latest-round filtering uses pull_request_review_id
CodeRabbit latest-round filtering uses the latest bot review id
round_decisions contains only the latest selected provider comments
The generated decisions artifact rejects stale provider comments

evals.prompt: /pr-review --auto 161 --review-source all 을 repo 바깥 디렉터리에서 실행했어. --repo-path 도 안 줬고 branch basename 에 ticket 도 애매해.
evals.expected_output: Auto mode should fail fast with a clear repo-path error first, and if repo resolution is later fixed but ticket extraction is still ambiguous, it should require --review-doc explicitly.
expectations: The workflow never guesses a repo outside the current working directory
The first failure is an explicit repo-path resolution error
Ambiguous ticket extraction requires --review-doc
The workflow does not create or update the wrong review doc

evals.prompt: Round 상태가 mutation-partial 인 PR #161 auto review를 다시 실행해줘. 같은 repo-path, 같은 review-doc, 같은 worktree path를 사용해.
evals.expected_output: The workflow should resume the existing managed round instead of creating a new round, reuse the same artifact directory, and allow the round to move from mutation-partial to live-posted on success.
expectations: update-review-round-doc.sh resumes the existing mutation-partial round
prepare-pr-worktree.sh reuses the recorded clean worktree for that round
Artifact paths remain inside the same .pr-review/pr-<PR>/round-N/ directory
Only mutation-partial -> live-posted is treated as an automatic resume path

evals.prompt: /pr-review --auto 161 --review-source all --repo-path /Users/eddie/Desktop/demodev/moving-frontend --review-doc /Users/eddie/Desktop/demodev/moving-frontend/docs/reviews/MOVE-658-review.md --worktree auto --live 로 실행해. round_decisions 에 pending 이 하나 남아 있어.
evals.expected_output: Live auto mode must fail before commit, push, reply, or resolve steps because pending decisions remain in the current managed round.
expectations: --live requires every selected latest-round decision to be accepted or declined
No commit or push happens while pending rows exist
No GitHub replies or thread resolutions are posted while pending rows exist
The error points the operator back to round_decisions as the canonical source to update
